params.TriggerDescription: When you planeswalk to CARDNAME and at the beginning of your upkeep, put your choice of a vigilance, menace, or trample counter on target creature you control.
When you planeswalk to CARDNAME and at the beginning of your upkeep, put your choice of a vigilance, menace, or trample counter on target creature you control.
Whenever chaos ensues, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland permanent card. Put that card onto the battlefield or into your hand.
